data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario outcome.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the persona scenario involving verification via registered email/SMS workflows. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or validations related to this requirement. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not offer concrete details or outcomes that would allow for a definitive validation of the expected result, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of validation for email/SMS workflows.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for email/SMS workflows
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete checks that verify the email/SMS workflows are functioning as expected.
